trackedDelta: Added tournaments: tour-de-france-femmes-2026 (catalog.json#tier1 cycling wholesale + Uno-X damelag), grand-chess-tour-saint-louis-2026 (catalog.json#tier2.tournaments + tier2.athletes). Updated f1-world-championship-2026 (Belgia GP kjørt → Ungarn GP neste) and kristoffer-reitan (The Open ferdig, nr. 18). Total 23 tracked entries.

failures: Minor: all 11 events carry estimated (not officially published) start times — correctly disclosed in each summary and held at confidence medium, but verify must firm up the times before the events go near-term.
Minor: TdF Femmes stage summaries 2-9 are terse/templated; the Uno-X squad is only partially confirmed (Aalerud/Andersen via official rider profiles, full roster unpublished).
No hard failures; provenance, schema-compliance, streaming contract, and the independent chess date-correction are all sound.

notes: Standard-tier Opus, Monday forenoon, ~3.5h after the prior 04:20Z run. Three parallel scout subagents (TdF Femmes; Grand Chess Tour Saint Louis; broad Norwegian sweep + TdF-men/CS2 verify) + one independent fresh-context write-time fact-checker, all with real web search. Monday 20 July = TdF men's SECOND REST DAY (no stage, no result to write).

PRIMARY VALUE — two real coverage gaps closed, both from coverage-audit.json (06:47Z): (1) HIGH, escalated: the ENTIRE Tour de France Femmes 2026 (1-9 Aug, Lausanne->Nice, 9 stages) was missing — the men's Tour had been built stage-by-stage but the women's Grand Tour was never added. Added all nine stages (confidence medium; route/dates triple-sourced Wikipedia+letourfemmes.fr+cyclingstage and fact-checked; exact start times not yet published -> estimated & flagged in each summary). Norwegian angle: Uno-X Mobility women's team, Katrine Aalerud + Susanne Andersen confirmed via official rider profiles (full squad unpublished). Streaming TV 2 Play (TV 2's 2026-2030 Tour rights cover the women's race). (2) MEDIUM: Grand Chess Tour Saint Louis leg — added Saint Louis Rapid & Blitz (31 Jul-7 Aug) + Sinquefield Cup (8-21 Aug), both catalog tournaments with catalog players (Caruana/Keymer/Giri/Aronian/So/Praggnanandhaa + Firouzja). DATES CORRECTED by the fact-checker: the audit's guessed '2-6 Aug'/'10-20 Aug' were wrong; correct 31.7-7.8 and 8-21.8 (grandchesstour.org + ChessBase + chess.com). Carlsen does not play (Esports World Cup). Free on Saint Louis Chess Club YouTube/Twitch; no Norwegian TV rights.

RE-VERIFIED UNCHANGED (no board edit): TdF men etappe 16 (ITT Evian->Thonon) Tue 21 Jul start 11:00 UTC confirmed; GC after stage 15 unchanged (Pogacar yellow, Evenepoel +5:00, del Toro +5:58 white, Seixas +6:23, Lipowitz +6:48; best Norwegian Tobias Halland Johannessen ~13th-14th; green Pedersen; KOM-classification led by Pogacar); no new Norwegian withdrawals (only Traen; Charmig is Danish). CS2 both 100 Thieves matches Wed 22 Jul confirmed (StarSeries vs NIP 13:00 UTC Kick/Twitch; BLAST Bounty vs Falcons 17:30 UTC); rain on active roster. Golf 3M Open (Ventura in field, tee times unpublished) 23-26 Jul; Hovland FedEx St. Jude field not locked until after Wyndham ~2 Aug (date-gated). Tennis Ruud Montreal (1-13 Aug) date-gated (draw 31 Jul). Football Lyn-Stromsgodset away 25 Jul 18:00 CEST confirmed; Barca Birmingham friendly 31 Jul (time unpublished); Joan Gamper 19 Aug both opponent (Al Ahly only reported) AND time still unofficial -> held off board. Athletics Warholm confirmed entered NM Trondheim 23-25 Jul (NRK); EM Birmingham 10-16 Aug no new startlist. Handball off-season (Norwegian leagues start week 37/Sept); winter sports off-season; no new breakthrough-athlete or broadcaster news in RSS.
validate-events.js: 57 events, 0 errors (2 benign timezone-bleed warnings for the multi-day chess tournaments crossing midnight in CET). Independent grader: pass, score 93, no hard failures.
